record.comment: As added Pub. L. 115-243, sec. 2(a), 132 Stat. 2894. Trigger not enabled.
As added Pub. L. 115-271, title VI, sec. 6042, Oct. 24, 2018, 132 Stat. 3979.
As added Pub. L. 115-271, title V, sec. 5042(a), Oct. 24, 2018, 132 Stat. 3967.
No trigger available for this addition: Should be sec. 50802(2), stat. p. 282.
